backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Student Bank canister implementing CRUD operations for students, accounts, transactions, bank details, and user profiles with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl.
backend/migration.mo: Trivial migration module that returns the state unchanged, serving as a no-op migration runner.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: fixing frontend mutation hooks to use an authenticated actor, and ensuring the useActor hook initialises correctly for signed canister update calls.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to one-line summaries describing each component's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app with QueryClientProvider, AuthProvider, and Toaster, then renders LoginPage when unauthenticated or a role-aware DashboardLayout with page routing when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/AccountForm.tsx: Modal dialog form for creating or editing bank account records, with student and IFSC dropdowns, auto-filled bank name, inline error display, loading spinner, and closes only on successful mutation.
frontend/src/components/BankDetailForm.t: A dialog form component for adding or editing bank details (bank name, IFSC code, taluka, district) with validation and loading states using React Query mutations.
A layout wrapper component that renders a collapsible sidebar, a top header bar with page title and admin/user role badge, and a scrollable main content area.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: A responsive sidebar navigation component that renders role-filtered nav items, user info, and a logout button, supporting mobile overlay and desktop static modes.
frontend/src/components/StudentForm.tsx: A dialog form component for adding or editing student records (name, DOB, class, attendance number, school, taluka, district) with validation and React Query mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides an AuthContext and hook managing admin/user session state with login (including Internet Identity for admins) and logout, persisting sessions to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity provider and hook wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to manage identity state, login/logout flow, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on students, accounts, transactions, bank details, and user profiles, wrapping actor calls with query/mutation logic and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins/Nunito fonts, configures Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including gradient and sidebar tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AccountPage.tsx: Page component for managing bank accounts, providing a searchable table with add, edit, and delete functionality using the account query hooks and AccountForm component.
frontend/src/pages/BankDetailsPage.tsx: Page component for managing bank details (name, IFSC, taluka, district), with a searchable table and add/edit/delete actions backed by bank detail query hooks and BankDetailForm.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Page component for searching and displaying transaction history by account number and optional date range, with print and CSV export capabilities and deposit/withdrawal summaries.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Dashboard overview page that displays summary stat cards (total students, accounts, deposits, withdrawals, and current balance) fetched via React Query hooks, with loading skeletons and a refresh button.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with a toggle between Admin and User login modes, handling form submission via the useAuth hook and displaying errors on failure.
frontend/src/pages/PassbookPage.tsx: Passbook page that looks up an account by number, displays transaction history with running balance, and supports printing; non-admin users are restricted to viewing only their own account.
frontend/src/pages/StudentPage.tsx: Student management page that lists all students in a searchable table and supports adding, editing, and deleting students via a modal form.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionPage.tsx: Transaction page with a form to add deposits or withdrawals to a selected account, and a table showing recent transactions for that account.
frontend/src/utils/exportCSV.ts: Utility module providing date/currency formatters and an exportTransactionsCSV function that builds and triggers a CSV download of an account's transaction history.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH-based color palette (bank-green, bank-orange, bank-teal), custom fonts (Nunito, Poppins), border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for a student bank mobile app, documenting existing features, architectural notes (role-based access, localStorage/canister sync), and known issues with login and data persistence.
